Description: Continued naira devaluation erodes USD-equivalent revenue and investment return
Mitigation: Revenue in NGN; funding in USD with natural hedge strategy; FX risk disclosed to investors

Description: CBN may deny or delay Payment Service Bank / Fintech licence
Mitigation: Early pre-application engagement with CBN Innovation Lab; appoint CBN-experienced compliance officer

Description: High inflation reduces consumer discretionary spend on financial products
Mitigation: Target essential payment services (utility bills, transport, remittances) which are less elastic

Description: MTN MoMo or Airtel Money achieve network effect lock-in before entrant scales
Mitigation: Partner with Tier-2 telcos; focus on underserved segments not yet captured by telco wallets

Description: Agent fraud or poor user experience damages brand in target communities
Mitigation: Tiered agent KYC; real-time monitoring dashboard; performance bonuses for compliant agents

Description: Lending book NPL ratio exceeds 10% due to lack of credit bureau coverage
Mitigation: Conservative LTV ratios in Y1; leverage CBN Credit Risk Management System (CRMS); alternative data scoring

Description: Major data breach or fraud incident undermines user trust and triggers CBN sanctions
Mitigation: ISO 27001 certification; dedicated fraud team; mandatory MFA; bug bounty programme

Description: NDPR or new CBN regulation mandating stricter Nigerian data residency
Mitigation: Build infrastructure on Nigerian cloud nodes (AWS Lagos, Azure West Africa) from day one

Description: Established players cut transaction fees to zero to defend market share
Mitigation: Differentiate on product depth (lending, insurance, savings) rather than transaction fee price

Description: Dependency on NIBSS or CBN payment infrastructure causes service outages
Mitigation: Multi-bank settlement redundancy; SLA agreements; in-app service status page

Description: Competitive market drives CAC above unit economics threshold
Mitigation: Referral programme; SME B2B2C channel; USSD fallback for feature-phone users

Description: Security incidents in North-East / North-West reduce addressable agent footprint
Mitigation: Initial focus on South-West, South-East, and FCT; phased North expansion with security assessment
